creator: jes@hal-pc.org
text:
make tries to ln -sf shared libraries w/ minor numbers in libtermcap when BINFORMAT=elf

Fix: 

diffs for libtermcap's makefile are at http://www.hal-pc.org/~jes/mtermcap.diff
How-To-Repeat: make obj/depend/all/install in src/lib when BINFORMAT=elf is in /etc/make.conf
